name: Piyus Mohanty
title: Founder & Counsellor
bio:
Piyus Mohanty-  is a Certified Career Counselor and also a Career Analyst with a Master Degree in Statistics and Business Administration.  He Brings a strong blend of academic and corporate experience to his practice.

Piyus Previously served as a Asst. Professor in management studies and spent several years as a Trainer in SBILife.  He Combines this background with deep expertise in Career pathways and Psychometric assessment to deliver clear, Data Driven guidance

He works with students and working professionals to align their strength, interest, Personality and aptitudes with right career direction.
